title: VALUES with more tuples
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value INT NOT NULL);
SELECT X FROM (VALUES (5, 10), (10, 5)) AS t(X, Y) WHERE X < Y;
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value IN (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE id < 3);
SELECT X FROM (VALUES (NULL, 1), (1, NULL)) AS t(X, Y) WHERE X < Y;
key_bug_features: FILTER with VALUES containing multiple tuples
